channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Resonator Tweaks
item.description: Simple mod to play the resonator as a sound effect. Will play with music off .

item.title: Resonator Overhaul
item.description: Per-resonator volume, falloff radius and looping — saved to the world, synced to all players, and au

item.title: ReelMower
item.description: Push reel mower. Cut grass, Multiplayer in testing

item.title: KRPG Enchantment
item.description: Adds MC-like enchantment system to VS.

item.title: Riley's Classes [ALPHA]
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: VS TrueScale 128 HD
item.description: Hand-tuned 128px Custom SR + selective Krita HD redraws.

item.title: Beams Go In Mining Bag
item.description: Adds the ability to put support beams (and crowbars!) in mining bags. Cave-Ins players rejoice!

item.title: String Editor
item.description: The Transform Designer of Localization authoring. Word processing, it's simple.

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: Traders Buy Iron Tools
item.description: Adds the ability for traders of all sorts to buy iron tools and more!

item.title: Sounds of Nature
item.description: Brings the world to life with realistic ambient wildlife audio that reacts to where you are.

item.title: Echoes of the Drift
item.description: Work-in-progress quest campaign - wake the Resonant Atlas and hunt echoes by compass.

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: Mad Hoarding
item.description: An extension to Food Shelves and Purposeful Storage to increase capacity of some containers and alte

item.title: In Dappled Groves Firewood Buff Continued
item.description: Adjusts some of In Dappled Groves' recipes

item.title: Elk Adornments
item.description: Masks for you and your elk with Modular Elk Armor!

item.title: CB Harmony Patches
item.description: Harmony patches for my personal server.

item.title: Alternative armor designs
item.description: With this mod, you can make use of all game armor designs for each equivalent armor type.

item.title: WOO Fantasy Additions
item.description: A mod focused on bringing the lore of the Oldwood into Vintage Story.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: The Monsterpack
item.description: This pack adds a handful of monster to the game

item.title: WOO³
item.description: A modpack that contains custom content and server tweaks for the Whispers of Oldwood season 3.

item.title: Downed
item.description: Replaces the vanilla downed state with a survivable, invulnerable downed state. Quite bloody.

item.title: PlayerCollisions
item.description: Adds player collision box repulsion.

item.title: Seraphs Ledger
item.description: A personal bundle of small quality-of-life tweaks for Vintage Story.

item.title: Caeloria: Content
item.description: Content pack for Caeloria: Reborn. Doesn't include any code mods, those are different mods.

item.title: Vanilla+ classes
item.description: A small mod, reshuffling class traits and roles, and equalising their usefulness for multiplayer.

item.title: WOO Presents: Fantasy Crops
item.description: Fantasy Crops catered to play on the Whispers of Oldwood, available for all.

item.title: Vintage Kinematics
item.description: Rotation networks, belts, crushers, and automation for Vintage Story

item.title: Player Model lib
item.description: Library for adding new player races
